title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn | $900–$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat control for homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Dyker Heights homeowners facing bat infestations need professional, humane removal services that protect both property and wildlife. Our specialized bat removal and exclusion services address the unique challenges of Dyker Heights' mix of stately brick homes, multi-family residences, and older construction where bats commonly roost. We provide complete bat control solutions with guaranteed exclusion to keep your Dyker Heights home bat-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of bat removal experience to Dyker Heights, with certified wildlife technicians who understand Brooklyn's bat species and local building codes. We offer same-day emergency service, humane removal methods, complete attic restoration, and lifetime exclusion warranties to ensure your Dyker Heights property remains protected.
localContext: Dyker Heights' beautiful tree-lined streets and well-established homes—particularly around Dyker Beach Park and the neighborhood's famous Christmas light displays—often feature older attics, chimneys, and architectural details that provide ideal entry points for bats. The proximity to parks and green spaces means bat activity is common, making professional exclusion essential for maintaining these cherished family homes.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Dyker Heights typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the colony size, number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are bats common in Dyker Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, bats are relatively common in Dyker Heights due to the neighborhood's mature trees, proximity to Dyker Beach Park, and abundance of older homes with attics and chimneys. Little brown bats and big brown bats frequently roost in residential structures, especially during summer maternity season.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in NYC humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all New York State and NYC regulations for humane bat removal, using exclusion methods that allow bats to leave safely but prevent re-entry. We never harm bats and observe seasonal restrictions during maternity periods (typically June through August) when flightless pups are present.

faqs.question: What does bat exclusion involve for Dyker Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Our bat exclusion process includes a thorough inspection to identify all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices, sealing of gaps and openings in soffits, vents, chimneys, and rooflines, attic cleanup and decontamination if needed, and a warranty to guarantee bats won't return. We address the architectural features common to Dyker Heights homes to ensure complete protection.
